title: enabled_builtin_tools naming a tool the agent doesn't offer fails fast
description: enabled_builtin_tools is an allow-list over the agent's own tool surface. A name that isn't one of the agent's tools is a Commission/agent collision: the agent MUST emit error_occurred with code commission_collision and stop with reason error BEFORE running any model turn (no assistant_message). Uses a clearly-bogus tool name so it collides on every agent regardless of its native tool names.

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.
